Experience untamed elegance with a vetiver expression inspired by an English garden party wandering into the wild. Wild Vetiver is a fragrance off the beaten path, walking the line between precise refinement and nature. Born from noble roots yet spirited in its freedom, this sculpted composition reveals a vibrant tension between sophistication and wilderness. Opening with the spiced vibrancy of hand-harvested timur berry, the heart unfolds as rose centifolia rambles freely. At the base, vetiver casts a woody trail, grounding the composition with modern elegance. This is an enchanting journey through an aristocratic garden, where halcyon moments and the joy of missing out drift through the air.

A Statement Of Individuality

Wild Vetiver is presented in the signature fragrance bottle of The House of Creed that traces the shape of a classic hip flask. Flushed in a verdant green hue inspired by nature’s exuberance, it invites you to venture beyond the half-opened garden gates.

 

Journey Through An Aristocratic Garden

Be transported to a scene where halcyon moments unfold and the senses awaken wildly. Wander barefoot through the grass. On the picnic blanket, wit sharpens, and the art of conversation rules. Nothing and everything matters. Minutes and hours flow effortlessly, like elegance itself.

Captivate from business to bar and beyond with Aventus, the most revered fragrance from The House of Creed with unmatched versatility, tailor-made for any moment. A vibrant debut of exclusive, hand-picked Calabrian bergamot, tinged with lemon and pink pepper, gives way to a luscious pineapple and patchouli heart. This tantalising juiciness is cut with smoky birch and decadent cedarwood at the base, adding a lingering sense of sophistication to this distinctive Eau de Parfum.

A Millésime Creation

Aventus is a fragrance of "Millésime" quality, a French wine term that translates to "a great vintage". This hallmark of excellence means it has been crafted using only the finest ingredients, from the dynamic pineapple that develops at its heart to the sophisticated smokiness of birch at its base.

A Fragrance Of Distinction

Crafted to mark The House of Creed's 250th anniversary, Aventus soon gained acclaim and today stands proudly as one of the most celebrated fragrances in the world. An olfactive ode to strength and success, it is housed in Creed's signature bottle, shaped like a classic gentleman's hip flask.

The Aventus Collection

The Aventus collection features not only the finest fragrances, but also indulgent grooming essentials, porcelain candles and more, all hand-blended using age-old methods. The result is an unrivalled range that distills The House of Creed's unique commitment to artistry and perfection.

Absolu Aventus is a striking reimagination of classic Aventus, destined to deliver the ultimate olfactive experience to those who appreciate the extraordinary. A burst of citrus energy is instantly brought by bright bergamot with a twist of exquisitely fresh grapefruit, before revealing the signature pineapple and patchouli heart of its original inspiration. This spirit of Aventus is soon redefined as warming spices and smoky Haitian vetiver usher in, adding depth and complexity to the composition.

A Bold Interpretation Of Aventus Deriving its name from the Latin word "absolvere", meaning "to set free", Absolu Aventus reimagines classic Aventus, remaining true to the spirit of the original fragrance while letting it soar unbounded. Presented in a striking jetblack bottle, it conveys a sense of unmatched sophistication.

A Striking Symphony Of Citrus And Woods Vivifying grapefruit adds a refined twist to evocative pineapple, brightening a chorus of bergamot and lemon while singing in counterpoint with smoky Haitian vetiver. Meanwhile, spicy ginger, cinnamon and cardamom add an air of intrigue for an audacious, lingering dry-down.

A Daring New Chapter Once a rare limited edition, Absolu Aventus now finds its forever home at The House of Creed alongside iconic Aventus and its fresher expression in Aventus Cologne. Breaking olfactive ground, it marks a daring chapter in the Aventus story, bringing newfound depth and dimension to the collection.

Fragaria was originally crafted by the artisans at The House of Creed as a limited-edition fragrance and, owing to exceptional demand, has now sold out. While it is no longer available, you are invited to discover Carmina, a bold floral amber fragrance for her. With its signature cherry-rose note, this captivating creation carries the same spirited sweetness, playful femininity and flirtatious intrigue that made Fragaria so adored.

A Millésime Creation

Fragaria is a limited-edition fragrance of "Millésime" quality, a French wine term that translates to "a great vintage". This hallmark of excellence, applied to all creations from The House of Creed, means it has been hand-crafted using only the finest ingredients.

 


A Vibrant And Enticing Design

Fragaria is presented in the signature Creed bottle that traces the shape of a classic hip flask. Inspired by a lusciously ripe strawberry, the design is both vibrant and enticing in a glossy pink hue that captures the flirtatious fragrance for her contained within.

 

A Dose Of Nostalgia

Fragaria pays tribute to the classic strawberry, a quintessential symbol of British summertime that bursts with vibrant colour and unparalleled sweetness. Evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth, this fragrance adds a fresh twist of modernity to this beloved note.
